name: Mexican Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Chopped cooked turkey or chicken
4 oz Diced green chili peppers, drained
1 1/2 cups Shredded cheddar or Monterey jack cheese (6 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the turkey, gravy, sour cream, chili peppers, green onions, and olives.
2. Grease the sides of a microwave-safe 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle one-third of the corn chips over the bottom of the casserole dish.
4. Pour half of the turkey mixture over the chips.
5. Top with half the cheese.
6. Repeat layers, reserving the last portion of corn chips.
7. Bake in a conventional oven at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
OR
8. Microwave covered, on 100 percent power (high) for 9 to 12 minutes or until heated through, stirring once.
9. Top with the reserved corn chips.
